languages.text: "Этот тайный покой был его убежищем и лабораторией. Вероятно, Себериан был чрезмерно заинтересован в... радикальных идеях".
"This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."
languages.original_text: "Этот тайный покой был его убежищем и лабораторией. Вероятно, Себериан был чрезмерно заинтересован в... радикальных идеях".

traits.locale_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."
"This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."
"This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

languages.text: “这个密室既是他的避难所，也是他的实验室。我相信塞贝里安对某些……激进理念过于热衷了。”
languages.original_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

traits.locale_text: “这个密室既是他的避难所，也是他的实验室。我相信塞贝里安对某些……激进理念过于热衷了。”

languages.text: «Esta cámara secreta era su santuario y su laboratorio. Creo que Seberian estaba demasiado interesado en ciertas... ideas radicales».
languages.original_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

traits.locale_text: «Esta cámara secreta era su santuario y su laboratorio. Creo que Seberian estaba demasiado interesado en ciertas... ideas radicales».

languages.text: « Cette salle secrète lui servait de sanctuaire et de laboratoire. Je pense que Seberian s'intéressait un peu trop à... des idées radicales. »
languages.original_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

traits.locale_text: « Cette salle secrète lui servait de sanctuaire et de laboratoire. Je pense que Seberian s'intéressait un peu trop à... des idées radicales. »

languages.text: "Diese Geheimkammer war sein Zufluchtsort und Labor. Ich glaube, dieser Seberian hatte reges Interesse für ... radikale Ideen."
languages.original_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Geheimkammer war sein Zufluchtsort und Labor. Ich glaube, dieser Seberian hatte reges Interesse für ... radikale Ideen."

languages.text: "Bu gizli oda onun sığınağı ve laboratuvarıydı. Seberian'ın... Radikal fikirlere fazlasıyla ilgi duyduğuna inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

traits.locale_text: "Bu gizli oda onun sığınağı ve laboratuvarıydı. Seberian'ın... Radikal fikirlere fazlasıyla ilgi duyduğuna inanıyorum."

languages.text: この秘密の部屋は彼の避難所であり、研究室だった。シベリアは過度に...急進的な考えに興味を持っていたのだと思う。
languages.original_text: "This secret chamber was his sanctuary and laboratory. I believe that Seberian was overly interested in... radical ideas."

traits.locale_text: この秘密の部屋は彼の避難所であり、研究室だった。シベリアは過度に...急進的な考えに興味を持っていたのだと思う。
